title: Burg Wachter DCW207 DCW White, Surface Mounted, Spring Loaded Door Closer with 1/2 Hour Fire Rating, Black, Brass, Polished, Satin Chrome
description: From the manufacturer Who We Are Burg Wächter offers a range of physical security hardware with an emphasis on quality and great value. Burg-Wächter, Europe’s largest safe and post box manufacturer and a trusted brand throughout the world. Burg-Wächter has a proud heritage of over 120 years and are recognised for quality standards across our extensive range of locks, padlocks, safes, post boxes and access control solutions. Over 120 years security experience 10,000 individual product lines Europe’s one of the largest safe and post box manufacturer Burg Wachter Spring Loaded Door Closer DCSC217B - White Finish The Burg Wachter white surface mounted door closer is spring loaded with adjustable tension and can be used on left or right hand opening doors up to 68kg in weight. The body is 32mm wide by 117mm in height, with the'closer arm' being 150mm. Manufactured with a strong zinc die cast body for a long life. Simple to install and come complete with all required fixings.
